SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BalanceCommand
Command executor for /bal and /balance.
BankNoteInteractListener
Listener that allows players to redeem banknotes by shift-right-clicking while holding them.
BankNoteIssueResult
Result of issuing a new physical bank note.
BankNoteManager
Handles issuing and redeeming physical banknotes.
BankNoteRecord
Immutable banknote database record.
BankNoteRepository
Repository responsible for persistence of bank notes.
ConfigManager
Loads and exposes Realm configuration files.
Core
Main entry point for the Realm plugin.
DatabaseManager
Manages the Realm SQLite database connection and schema.
DatabaseManager.SqlCallable<T>
SQL operation that returns a value and may throw SQLException.
DatabaseManager.SqlRunnable
SQL operation with no return value that may throw SQLException.
EconomyAdminCommand
Admin economy command executor for /eco.
EconomyModule
Economy module bootstrapper.
EconomyRepository
Database access layer for economy operations.
EventSystem
Lightweight internal event bus for Realm.
JobActionContext
A normalized player action emitted from Bukkit listeners.
JobActionGroups
Utility for adding coarse selectors such as #LOGS or #HOSTILE.
JobActionType
Normalized action types that can award job progress or payouts.
JobCapState
Daily earned totals used to clamp job rewards.
JobCommand
Minimal jobs command surface for joining, leaving, and viewing jobs.
JobDefinition
Immutable definition of a job loaded from configuration.
JobDefinitionLoader
Loads job definitions from jobs.yml.
JobDefinitionRegistry
In-memory registry of configured jobs.
JobLevelUpEvent
Event published when a player levels up in a job.
JobManager
Main API for assigning, removing, and querying player jobs.
JobMembershipResult
Result for joining or leaving a job.
JobPayoutNotifier
Aggregates short-lived job payouts into a single satisfying action-bar pulse.
JobRewardService
Converts normalized job actions into xp, levels, and money payouts.
JobsActionListener
Converts Bukkit events into normalized job actions.
JobsModule
Bootstrapper for the jobs module.
JobsRepository
Persistence layer for player jobs, progression, reward caps, and explorer progress.
LedgerCommand
Admin command to view recent ledger entries for a player.
LedgerEntry
A single immutable row from the economy ledger.
LedgerRecordedEvent
Event published after a ledger entry has been committed to the database.
LedgerRepository
Repository for creating and reading economy ledger entries.
LevelingSettings
Per-job progression settings loaded from configuration.
Module
Represents a feature module that can be enabled/disabled/reloaded by the core plugin.
MoneySource
Identifies the subsystem that initiated a money movement.
PayCommand
Command executor for /pay <player> <amount>.
PlacedBlockGuardObservationCache
Short-lived cross-module cache for placed-block anti-farm observations.
PlayerJob
Current job membership and progression for a player.
PlayerJoinListener
Bukkit event adapter for player joins.
PlayerRepository
Database access layer for player records.
PlayerUpsertedEvent
Internal event published after a player has been inserted/updated in the database.
RealmCommand
Handles the /realm command.
RealmEvent
Base interface for all internal Realm events.
RealmEventListener<T>
Listener callback for a specific RealmEvent type.
RedeemCommand
Handles the /redeem command.
RewardRule
Configured reward for a single job action selector.
SkillActionContext
Normalized skill action emitted from Bukkit listeners.
SkillCategory
Top-level grouping for skill presentation and filtering.
SkillDefinition
Immutable definition for a configured skill.
SkillDefinitionLoader
Loads skill definitions from skills.yml.
SkillDefinitionRegistry
In-memory registry of configured skills.
SkillLevelUpEvent
Event published when a player levels up in a skill.
SkillManager
Read-facing API for player skill progress.
SkillNotifier
Sends player-facing notifications for skill xp and level-up milestones.
SkillProgress
Stored player progress for a single skill.
SkillProgressionSettings
Level progression settings for a skill.
SkillProgressService
Applies skill xp actions and handles leveling progression.
SkillsActionListener
Converts Bukkit actions into normalized skill actions.
SkillsCommand
Command for viewing player skill levels and xp.
SkillsModule
Bootstrapper for the skills module.
SkillsRepository
Persistence layer for skill xp and levels.
TransactionManager
Central gateway for all money movement in the server economy.
TransactionResult
Result of a transaction performed by TransactionManager.
WithdrawCommand
Handles the /withdraw <amount> command.
